title: Daniel's Fudge Pie
ingredients: 1 pie crust, lightly baked (use pie weights)
instructions: Make the pie crust and cool the lightly baked shell.
Melt the chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler or carefully in the microwave.
Cool the chocolate and butter mixture until it is tepid.
Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat the eggs and sugar in a medium-sized mixing bowl until the mixture is thick and light yellow, about 2 minutes.
Add the chocolate mixture and mix on medium speed until blended, about 30 seconds, occasionally scraping the sides of the bowl.
Cover the edge of the pie crust with aluminum foil to prevent it from burning.
Pour the chocolate filling into the shell and bake for 35-40 minutes.
Remove the aluminum foil from the crust after 30 minutes of baking.
Serve the pie warm with whipped cream.
notes: This was one of Dan's favorite desserts growing up.
A quick dessert to create, often made for Sunday dinner dessert.
